program: Business English — Desbloqueio para Lideranca em Oncologia
hub_subtitle: Desbloqueio Comunicativo para Liderança em Oncologia Internacional

lesson.menu_desc: Writing clear, polite professional emails -- requests, confirmations and email language -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 9 -- Writing Professional Emails
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernando Varela | Aula 9 -- Writing Professional Emails

listenings.text: Hi Fernando, this is Sarah. I am writing to confirm our meeting next week. Could you send me the report before the call? I would also like to request the new numbers. Please reply when you are available. I am going to forward this email to the team. Best regards, Sarah.

Dear partner, I am writing to arrange a meeting about the new project. Could you confirm your availability for next week? I would like to send you the report, so I am going to attach it to this email. Please reply with a good day and time. This is a friendly reminder about the deadline. Best regards, Fernando.
